summary: This document is an internal compliance checklist tracking pending items for the DTAC (Digital Technology Assessment Criteria) submission. It lists required regulatory documentation such as DCB-0129, DPIA, and Cyber Essentials, noting which are assumed present versus missing. The content includes internal action items and mixed-language notes regarding costs and next steps with bodies like the CQC and MHRA.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/7. Administratives/2. UK Regulations/2. DTAC/DTAC - Pending Items.docx
sniff_test_notes: Contains mixed English/Spanish notes and admits to answering 'yes' to compliance items that are actually missing ('Assumed we have... but don't'). Includes specific cost figures and staff names.
